fields.label: Account ID
fields.helpText: From Cloudflare dashboard -> Overview -> Account ID (right sidebar)

fields.label: R2 Access Key ID
fields.helpText: From Cloudflare -> R2 -> Manage R2 API Tokens

fields.label: R2 Secret Access Key
fields.helpText: From the same R2 API Token creation page

healthcheck_config.description: Validates R2 credentials via bucket listing

metadata.summary: Cloudflare R2 S3-compatible object storage with zero egress fees for storing and serving files.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Log in to the Cloudflare dashboard.
2. Go to R2 -> Manage R2 API Tokens.
3. Create a new API token with Object Read & Write permissions.
4. Copy the Access Key ID, Secret Access Key, and your Account ID.
5. Paste all values here.
